done_summary:
Successfully extracted all 20 fields from the Veridyne Networks Q3 FY2026 press release into `/workspace/extraction_results.json`. 

Key results:
- All 20 schema fields were found and extracted — no uncertain/null fields
- Types validated: 4 integers (total_customers, customers_above_100k_arr, customers_above_1m_arr, fte_count_end_of_q3), 2 dates in ISO 8601 format, 3 strings, and 11 numbers
- Units matched exactly as specified (USD millions, percent)
- Forward-looking guidance values used the raised/current ranges ($722-$726M)
- Non-GAAP operating income correctly extracted as positive $9.8M (not the GAAP loss)
- ARR used the stated figure of $710M (press release said "exceeded $710 million")
- Detailed extraction notes written to `/workspace/notes.md`
